action.reasoning: Observation: iter 17 training achieved dev EER (aug) 0.0005, suspiciously perfect but likely overfitting to clean dev set. Test EER still unknown due to evaluator missing labels. Analysis: Need to improve generalization to unseen codecs with realistic codec simulations (using torchcodec). Also fine-tune existing best model with stronger augmentations, bigger batch size, and early stopping to push EER lower, hoping test performance improves. Decision: Update train.py with torchcodec-based augmentations (GSM, OPUS, G.722, etc.), increase batch size to 16, add early stopping, continue training from current best.ckpt, submit eval after to attempt test EER measurement. Update predict.py with length-bucketing for efficient inference.
